description_long: This is a classic-style motorcycle with a predominantly black body, featuring a fuel tank labeled 'HERALD' in gold and a visible engine block beneath. The motorcycle has two large spoked wheels, a round headlamp at the front, and a rectangular rear license plate. The seat is long and flat, suitable for one or two riders, and the handlebars are straight with visible grips and control levers. The exhaust pipe runs along the right side, and the rear features a taillight and indicators. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage or retro motorcycles, with a sturdy metal frame and minimalistic styling.
description: A black, retro-styled motorcycle with spoked wheels, a round headlamp, and a gold 'HERALD' logo on the fuel tank. It features a flat seat, straight handlebars, and a visible rear license plate.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the license plate, taillight, rear wheel, and the back of the seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'HERALD' logo, engine, spoked wheels, and the full length of the motorcycle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the round headlamp, front wheel, and the handlebar grips.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust pipe, engine, and the side profile of the seat and wheels.
